prompt: In image 1's mixer view, apply the visual style of the faders and meters from the mixing console interface shown in image 2.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Apply the distinct visual style of the faders and level meters from the mixing console interface shown in image 2 to the corresponding elements in image 1's mixer view. This includes redesigning the horizontal volume faders and their adjacent vertical level meters on the left side, and the master output meters at the top right, to adopt the metallic appearance, fader knob design, numerical value readouts, and segmented green, yellow, and red bar graph style from image 2.
objects: Track channels on the left side of the mixer
Horizontal volume faders with metallic appearance
Fader knobs featuring the design from Image 2
Vertical level meters adjacent to the faders, with metallic appearance
Numerical dB value readouts on the vertical level meters
Segmented green, yellow, and red bar graphs on the vertical level meters
Master output meters at the top right, with metallic appearance
Master output meters displaying numerical dB values and segmented green, yellow, and red bar graphs
